title: draba norvegica var. clivicola
intro: Draba norvegica var. clivicola, also known as the alpine whitlowgrass, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family, Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Draba norvegica var. clivicola include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
